content:
**🎨 New Generative Artwork Created**

**Title:** Aurora Borealis
**Time:** 2026-05-07 20:05 JST

**Description:**
Celestial light curtains dancing across the night sky. Multiple aurora waves with layered sine/cosine animations create flowing curtains of green, blue, and purple light. Interactive wind system responds to mouse movement, and cosmic bursts appear on click.

**Technical Details:**
- 15 aurora curtains with 5-layer wave system each
- 150 twinkling stars with glow effects
- Interactive wind influenced by mouse position
- Click-to-create cosmic burst particles
- Multiple wave frequencies for organic movement
- Fade effect for atmospheric depth

**Features:**
- Mouse movement controls wind direction
- Click anywhere for cosmic particle bursts
- Stars twinkle with individual phases
- Smooth gradient transparency
- Responsive to window resize
- Night sky ambient glow

**Color Palette:**
- Northern Green: rgb(100, 255, 150)
- Celestial Blue: rgb(100, 200, 255)
- Cosmic Purple: rgb(150, 100, 255)
- Aurora Pink: rgb(255, 150, 200)

**View Online:** https://ttikoantt.github.io/generative-art-mira/2026-05-07-20-aurora-borealis.html

**GitHub:** https://github.com/ttikoantt/generative-art-mira

✨ Created by Mira's Hourly Creative Experiment
